mapper.insert: INSERT INTO brand_category (brand_id, category, price) VALUES (#{brandId}, #{category}, #{price})
mapper.select: SELECT b.name AS brand, bc.price AS price FROM brand b JOIN brand_category bc ON b.id = bc.brand_id WHERE bc.category = #{category} ORDER BY bc.price LIMIT 1
SELECT b.name AS brand, bc.price AS price FROM brand b JOIN brand_category bc ON b.id = bc.brand_id WHERE bc.category = #{category} ORDER BY bc.price
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM brand_category; DELETE FROM brand;
